name: legal-validate
description: Iterate the instrument until structure, defined-term usage, and authority citations are all green.
fixPrompt: Fix the deliverable at {{deliverable.path}} so each failing check passes. required-sections: add the missing section and write its real content. defined-terms: find the defined term that no clause uses and either invoke it in the operative text or delete the definition — do not leave a dead definition. citation-integrity: define any cited-but-undefined authority, and either cite or remove any defined-but-unused authority. Edit only the instrument file.
guardrails: Never invent or fabricate an authority to satisfy citation-integrity — if an obligation rests on a statute you cannot cite, the obligation must change or the authority must be sourced, not faked.
Never satisfy defined-terms by inserting a hollow mention of a term — if a defined term has no operative role, delete the definition instead.
Never delete a required section to pass the structure check — write the section.
onExhausted: Stop. Report which checks still fail and why the instrument cannot yet be substantiated (e.g., an obligation genuinely lacks a governing authority). Recommend human review.
